name: Flat Barbell Bench Press
description: Lying flat on a bench, lower a barbell to your chest and press it back up.
instructions: Lie flat on the bench, feet flat on the floor, eyes directly under the bar.
Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, wrists straight.
Unrack the bar and lower it under control to your mid-chest.
Push the bar up powerfully, keeping your elbows slightly tucked (45 degrees).

name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
description: Lying on a 30-45 degree incline bench, lower a barbell to your upper chest and press it up.
instructions: Lie on an incline bench, feet flat on the floor, core tight.
Unrack the bar and lower it smoothly to your upper chest.
Drive the bar straight up until arms are extended, keeping shoulders pinned back.

name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
description: Lying on a decline bench, lower a barbell to your lower chest/upper abs and press it up.
instructions: Secure feet under pads and lie on a decline bench.
Bring the bar down slowly to your lower sternum.
Press the bar up along a vertical path to lock out.

name: Flat Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Lying flat on a bench, press dumbbells upwards, rotating them slightly for contraction.
instructions: Sit on a bench with dumbbells on your knees, then roll back under control.
Keep dumbbells at chest height, elbows at 45 degrees.
Press dumbbells straight up, converging slightly at the top without touching.

name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Lying on an incline bench, press dumbbells upwards to target the upper chest fibers.
instructions: Set incline to 30 degrees, sit and bring dumbbells to chest level.
Press dumbbells up over your face, keeping wrists stacked over elbows.
Lower under control until you feel a deep stretch in your upper chest.

name: Decline Dumbbell Bench Press
description: Lying decline, press dumbbells upwards to target the lower chest.
instructions: Lie back on a decline bench, holding dumbbells at chest height.
Press the weights up and slightly together.
Return slowly to the starting position.

name: Flat Dumbbell Flys
description: Lying flat, open your arms wide in an arc with a slight elbow bend, stretching the chest.
instructions: Lie on a flat bench holding dumbbells straight up with palms facing each other.
Lower the weights out to your sides in a wide arc, maintaining a soft bend in your elbows.
Squeeze your chest muscles to return the weights to the top along the same path.

name: Incline Dumbbell Flys
description: Lying incline, perform an arm-opening stretch to isolate the upper pectorals.
instructions: Sit on an incline bench, hold dumbbells over your chest, palms facing each other.
Lower dumbbells wide to the sides, feeling a stretch in your upper chest.
Hug an imaginary tree to return the dumbbells to the top.

name: Cable Crossover
description: Using high cables, bring your hands forward and down in front of your waist.
instructions: Set pulleys high, step forward, lean slightly forward, chest upright.
With elbows slightly bent, sweep hands down and together in front of your hips.
Squeeze your chest at the bottom before returning slow and wide.

name: Low-to-High Cable Flys
description: Using low cables, fly hands upwards and together to focus on upper clavicular chest fibers.
instructions: Set pulleys at the lowest point, step forward, palms facing forward.
Fly hands upward and inward to meet in front of your upper chest.
Return down slowly along the same upward arc.

name: High-to-Low Cable Flys
description: Using high cables, bring your hands down and together to isolate lower chest fibers.
instructions: Set pulleys at the highest point, hold handles, step out.
Push cables down and together in front of your midsection.
Return wide, maintaining elbow angle.

name: Chest Press Machine
description: Seated machine press to safely overload chest muscles without balance overhead.
instructions: Adjust the seat height so the handles align with your mid-chest.
Keep your back and shoulders pinned firmly against the back pad.
Push the handles straight out, exhaling as you extend your arms.

name: Incline Chest Press Machine
description: Seated incline machine press targeting upper pectorals.
instructions: Adjust seat so grips align with upper chest.
Press the weights upward and away along the machine guide path.
Slowly return to start, keeping tension on your muscles.

name: Pec Deck Fly Machine
description: Seated fly machine keeping arms supported while isolating chest contraction.
instructions: Sit back against pad, place forearms/hands on handles, elbows at 90 degrees.
Squeeze pads together in front of you, contracting your chest.
Slowly release back until arms are in line with shoulders.

name: Standard Pushups
description: Classic bodyweight exercise for chest, shoulders, and triceps.
instructions: Place hands shoulder-width apart in a high plank position.
Lower your body in a straight line until your chest nearly touches the floor.
Push through the floor to return to the starting plank.

name: Incline Pushups
description: Pushups with hands on an elevated platform, reducing weight and targeting lower chest.
instructions: Place hands on a bench or elevated platform, feet on the floor.
Lower chest to the platform, keeping body straight.
Press back up to full extension.

name: Decline Pushups
description: Pushups with feet elevated on a bench, shifting tension to the upper chest.
instructions: Place feet on a bench or platform, hands on the floor.
Lower your chest down, maintaining core tension.
Press up, keeping elbows tucked.

name: Chest Dips
description: Leaning forward on parallel bars, lower your body to target the lower chest and triceps.
instructions: Support yourself on parallel bars. Tilt your torso forward (30 degrees).
Bend elbows to lower your body until shoulders are below elbows.
Press back up, focusing on squeezing the chest.

name: Dumbbell Pullover
description: Lying across a bench, lower a dumbbell behind your head to expand chest cavity.
instructions: Lie across a bench, shoulders supported, hips slightly down.
Hold a dumbbell over your chest with both hands in a diamond grip.
Lower the weight back behind your head, keeping elbows slightly bent.
Pull the weight back up to vertical, squeezing your chest.

name: Landmine Press
description: Pressing a barbell loaded into a landmine base, targeting upper chest.
instructions: Stand holding the end of a landmine barbell in one hand near your shoulder.
Press the barbell forward and upward to lockout.
Squeeze your upper chest at the top and return under control.

name: Barbell Deadlift
description: Full-body compound pull loading spinal erectors, lats, glutes, and hamstrings.
instructions: Stand with mid-foot under the bar. Bend and grip the bar overhand.
Drop hips slightly, flatten your back, and pull shoulder blades back.
Push through the floor, standing up straight with the bar.
Lock out hips at the top without hyperextending your spine.

name: Conventional Deadlift
description: Standard deadlift stance prioritizing lower back, hamstrings, and erectors.
instructions: Feet hip-width apart, shins 1 inch from the bar.
Hinge at hips, keep spine neutral, grip bar shoulder-width.
Pull slack out of the bar, drive legs down to stand upright.

name: Sumo Deadlift
description: Wide stance deadlift shifting loading towards hips and legs while engaging mid-back.
instructions: Set feet very wide, toes angled out. Grip bar inside knees.
Keep torso more upright. Drive knees out, push floor away.
Stand tall, locking out knees and hips simultaneously.

name: Barbell Bent-Over Row
description: Hinged barbell row for overall back thickness.
instructions: Hold bar overhand. Hinge at hips (45 degrees), flat back.
Pull bar to your lower ribs, keeping elbows tucked close.
Lower bar slowly, feeling a stretch in your upper lats.

name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
description: Unilateral row supporting body on a bench to isolate lats and mid-back.
instructions: Place same-side knee and hand on a flat bench. Flat back.
Drape other arm straight down with a dumbbell.
Pull elbow up to your hip, squeezing lat. Lower under control.

name: T-Bar Row
description: Barbell or machine row using a V-bar handle to overload mid-back thickness.
instructions: Straddle the bar, hinge at hips, grip the V-handle.
Pull handle towards your chest, keeping elbows tucked.
Lower under control, keeping spine straight.

name: Wide-Grip Lat Pulldown
description: Overhead cable pull to build lat width (V-taper).
instructions: Grip the pulldown bar wide, palms facing forward.
Sit, secure thighs. Pull bar to upper chest, chest up.
Lead with elbows, squeezing lats. Return slowly.

name: Close-Grip Lat Pulldown
description: Overhead pull using V-handle to target lower lat fibers.
instructions: Attach a V-bar, sit, and grip handles.
Lean back slightly, pull handles straight down to mid-chest.
Contract lats at the bottom, then extend fully up.

name: Seated Cable Row
description: Horizontal cable pull targeting mid-back, rhomboids, and lats.
instructions: Sit at a cable station, feet on pads, knees slightly bent.
Hold handle, sit upright with a flat back.
Pull hands to your belly button, squeezing shoulder blades together.

name: Chest-Supported Dumbbell Row
description: Incline bench dumbbell row removing lower back stabilization requirements.
instructions: Lie face down on a 30-degree incline bench.
Hold dumbbells hanging down, pull elbows up high.
Squeeze shoulder blades together, lower with control.

name: Wide Grip Pullups
description: High-effort bodyweight overhead pull for maximum lat width.
instructions: Hang from a bar with a wide overhand grip.
Pull your collarbone up to the bar, leading with elbows.
Lower under control to a dead hang position.

name: Chinups
description: Underhand grip pullups loading lower lats and biceps.
instructions: Hang from a bar with an underhand shoulder-width grip.
Pull yourself up until your chin clears the bar.
Control the descent back to arms fully straight.

name: Inverted Row
description: Bodyweight row beneath a barbell or TRX handles.
instructions: Position bar at waist height, lie under it face up.
Grip bar overhand, hang with body in straight plank, heels down.
Pull your chest up to the bar. Lower to full extension.

name: Assisted Pullup Machine
description: Machine-counterbalanced pullup to develop vertical pulling strength.
instructions: Select weight support, stand/kneel on pad, grip wide.
Pull chest up towards the top handles.
Slowly lower down, resisting the upward push.

name: Back Extension (45 Deg)
description: Glute and lower back hinge targeting spinal erectors.
instructions: Position yourself in a back extension station, hips over pad.
Lower torso down by hinging at the hips, keeping back flat.
Raise torso back up to align with legs, squeezing glutes.

name: Straight-Arm Lat Pulldown
description: Cable pull with straight arms to isolate lat activation.
instructions: Stand facing cable stack, grip bar overhand, arms straight.
Pull the bar down to your thighs, keeping arms extended.
Contract lats, return slow to upper eye level.

name: Single-Arm Seated Cable Row
description: Unilateral seated row for deeper rotational lat stretch.
instructions: Sit, grab single handle, stretch forward allowing shoulder to extend.
Pull handle back to lower ribs, rotating torso slightly.
Control forward reach to isolate the single lat sweep.

name: Dumbbell Shrugs
description: Shrugging dumbbells to isolate upper traps.
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at your sides, arms straight.
Elevate your shoulders up towards ears as high as possible.
Squeeze, then lower slowly back to resting.

name: Barbell Shrugs
description: Shrugging a barbell to build upper traps.
instructions: Hold barbell in front of thighs with an overhand grip.
Raise shoulders straight up, keeping arms extended.
Squeeze traps at peak, return slowly.

name: Flat Bench Hyperextensions
description: Bodyweight spine erector exercise.
instructions: Lie face down on a hyperextension bench, heels secured.
Hinge forward at the waist under control.
Raise torso until parallel with your lower body.

name: Standing Barbell Curl
description: Classic bicep builder utilizing a straight barbell.
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell with underhand grip.
Keep elbows pinned to your ribs, shoulders back.
Curl bar up to shoulder height. Lower slowly, squeezing triceps at the bottom.

name: Standing Dumbbell Curl
description: Alternating dumbbell curls with wrist supination (rotation).
instructions: Hold dumbbells at sides, palms facing inwards.
As you curl up, rotate wrist so palm faces up.
Lower under control, returning palms to side orientation.

name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
description: Lying incline, stretching the long head of the bicep.
instructions: Sit on an incline bench at 45 degrees, dumbbells hanging straight down.
Keep elbows back, curl weights up, supinating wrists.
Lower slowly, enjoying the deep bicep stretch.

name: Dumbbell Hammer Curl
description: Neutral grip dumbbell curls focusing on brachialis and forearm size.
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells with palms facing each other (neutral).
Curl weights up, maintaining the neutral hammer grip throughout.
Lower under control, keeping wrists locked.

name: Concentration Curl
description: Seated isolated curl bracing elbow against inner thigh.
instructions: Sit on a bench, lean forward, brace elbow against inner thigh.
Drape arm down, holding dumbbell.
Curl weight up to chin, keeping body locked. Lower under control.

name: EZ-Bar Preacher Curl
description: Barbell curl bracing triceps against preacher bench to prevent cheating.
instructions: Sit on preacher bench, rest back of arms flat on pad.
Hold EZ-bar with underhand grip. Curl bar upward.
Lower slowly until arms are fully extended.

name: Dumbbell Preacher Curl
description: Unilateral bicep curl on preacher bench.
instructions: Drape single arm over preacher pad, holding dumbbell.
Curl dumbbell up, maintaining arm contact with pad.
Lower slowly to full extension.

name: Cable Bicep Curl
description: Constant tension bicep curls using a cable straight bar.
instructions: Stand facing cable stack, hold straight bar attached to low pulley.
Keep elbows tight to ribs, curl bar upward.
Resist the pull on the way down, extending arms.

name: Overhead Cable Curl
description: High cable double arm bicep curls simulating a front double biceps pose.
instructions: Stand center between cable towers, pulleys set high, holding single handles.
Extend arms out to sides parallel to floor.
Curl hands inward to ears, keeping upper arms parallel to floor.

name: Spider Curl
description: Lying face down on incline preacher pad, curls hanging straight down.
instructions: Lie face down on vertical side of preacher bench or incline bench.
Let arms hang straight down, hold barbell or dumbbells.
Curl barbell up, keeping elbows tucked beneath shoulders.

name: EZ-Bar Standing Curl
description: Bicep curls using a curved EZ-bar to reduce wrist strain.
instructions: Hold EZ-bar on the angled grips, palms angled in.
Curl the bar up, keeping elbows locked in place.
Lower under control, keeping wrists firm.

name: Reverse EZ-Bar Curl
description: Overhand grip bicep curls targeting brachioradialis forearm muscle.
instructions: Grip EZ-bar with an overhand (pronated) grip.
Curl bar up, keeping elbows pinned.
Lower under control, maintaining grip tension.

name: Single-Arm Cable Curl
description: Unilateral cable curl for isolated bicep contraction.
instructions: Grab single handle from low pulley, stand facing away/towards stack.
Curl handle up, keeping elbow in fixed position.
Extend arm fully back down.

name: Machine Preacher Curl
description: Gym machine isolating biceps using preacher pads.
instructions: Adjust seat, place elbows on pad, grab handles.
Pull handles up, contracting biceps.
Control resistance back down.

name: Zottman Curl
description: Curls supinating on the way up and pronating (overhand) on the way down.
instructions: Hold dumbbells, curl up with palms facing up.
At the top, rotate wrists so palms face down.
Lower weights with overhand grip. Rotate back at bottom.

name: Drag Curl
description: Bicep curl keeping the bar touching your body, pulling elbows backward.
instructions: Hold barbell, stand tall. Curl bar up by dragging it up your torso.
Elbows will slide backwards behind your body.
Squeeze biceps, return bar down contact route.

name: High Pulley Cable Curl
description: Single-arm cable curl using high pulley.
instructions: Stand next to high pulley, hold handle.
Curl hand down towards shoulder, elbow high.
Release slowly, resisting tension.

name: Cable Rope Hammer Curl
description: Neutral rope grip curl on low cable pulley.
instructions: Hold rope ends, palms facing each other.
Curl hands up towards shoulders.
Lower under control, keeping neutral grip.

name: Incline Hammer Curl
description: Lying incline neutral dumbbell curl.
instructions: Lie back on incline bench, weights neutral at sides.
Curl weights up while keeping palms facing inward.
Lower slow to stretch biceps.

name: Close-Grip Bench Press
description: Barbell press holding grip inside shoulder-width to load triceps.
instructions: Lie on bench, grip bar exactly shoulder-width apart.
Lower bar slowly to mid-chest, keeping elbows tucked tight to ribs.
Press bar up, focusing on locking out triceps.

name: Tricep Pushdown (Cable Rope)
description: Using cable rope to push down, flaring rope ends apart at extension.
instructions: Stand facing stack, hold rope ends. Pin elbows to ribs.
Push rope down, expanding ends wide at the bottom.
Slowly return up to chest height, keeping elbows stationary.

name: Tricep Pushdown (Straight Bar)
description: Straight bar pushdown to lock out maximum tricep loads.
instructions: Hold straight bar overhand, elbows at 90 degrees pinned to sides.
Push bar straight down to thighs, squeezing triceps.
Return slow, maintaining elbow position.

name: Overhead Dumbbell Extension
description: Two-handed overhead extension stretching tricep long head.
instructions: Sit or stand, hold single heavy dumbbell overhead with diamond grip.
Lower weight behind head, keeping elbows tucked close to ears.
Extend arms back to vertical lockout.

name: Skull Crushers (EZ-Bar)
description: Lying tricep extension lowering EZ-bar to forehead.
instructions: Lie on flat bench, hold EZ-bar straight up over chest.
Lower bar slowly by bending at elbows towards forehead or crown.
Keep elbows pointing forward, press bar back up.

name: Dumbbell Kickbacks
description: Bracing on bench, kick dumbbell back until arm is straight.
instructions: Place hand and knee on bench, hinge forward. Pin elbow high.
Hold dumbbell, kick arm straight back parallel to torso.
Squeeze tricep, slowly return elbow to 90 degrees.

name: Tricep Parallel Dips
description: Parallel bar dips keeping body upright to load triceps.
instructions: Support weight on parallel bars, torso vertical.
Lower under control by bending elbows to 90 degrees.
Press straight back up, squeezing triceps at lock out.

name: Bench Dips
description: Supporting hands on bench behind body, feet on floor, lower hips.
instructions: Place palms on edge of bench, feet extended in front.
Lower hips toward floor by bending elbows to 90 degrees.
Press through palms to return to starting height.

name: Cable Overhead Extension
description: Overhead rope extension pulling from low pulley.
instructions: Hold rope, turn away from low pulley, brace in lunge.
Lower rope behind head, elbows pointing forward.
Extend arms forward and upward to lockout.

name: Single-Arm Cable Pushdown
description: Unilateral pushdown to correct tricep strength imbalances.
instructions: Hold single handle from high pulley, pin elbow to side.
Press hand straight down to thigh.
Release slowly back to starting angle.

name: Machine Tricep Extension
description: Seated tricep extension machine isolating contraction.
instructions: Adjust seat, sit and place elbows flat on pad.
Hold handles and push weights downward/forward.
Extend fully, release slowly.

name: Diamond Pushups
description: Pushups placing thumbs and indexes together forming a diamond.
instructions: Set high plank with hands close, forming diamond on floor.
Lower chest to hands, keeping elbows tucked.
Press up, locking triceps.

name: Single-Arm Overhead Dumbbell Extension
description: Unilateral overhead extension isolating tricep.
instructions: Sit/stand holding dumbbell straight up in one hand.
Lower behind neck, supporting elbow with other hand.
Press up vertically.

name: Dumbbell Tate Press
description: Lying, flare elbows wide and press dumbbells inwards and up.
instructions: Lie on flat bench holding dumbbells together over chest.
Lower weights inward towards chest by flaring elbows out.
Press dumbbells back up vertically.

name: Barbell JM Press
description: Bench press/skull crusher hybrid lowering bar to chin.
instructions: Set up as close grip bench press.
Lower bar straight to throat/chin, bending elbows forward.
Press back up dynamically.

name: Cable Kickbacks
description: Tricep kickbacks pulling from a low cable stack.
instructions: Hinge forward at cable stack, pin elbow high.
Kick handle back, extending tricep completely.
Release slowly, maintaining high elbow.

name: Assisted Dip Machine (Triceps)
description: Machine counterweight tricep dips.
instructions: Stand on pad, grab handles keeping chest upright.
Lower until elbows are at 90 degrees.
Push down to lift yourself back to starting.

name: Lying Dumbbell Extension
description: Lying flat dumbbell skull crushers.
instructions: Lie flat, hold dumbbells over shoulders, palms face each other.
Lower weights past ears by pivoting at elbows.
Extend back to vertical.

name: Reverse Grip Tricep Pushdown
description: Underhand pushdown on cable bar.
instructions: Hold straight bar underhand (supinated), elbow pinned.
Press down to thighs, locking out triceps.
Return slow, keeping wrists firm.

name: Dumbbell Floor Press
description: Floor press restricting shoulder range to load tricep lockout.
instructions: Lie on floor, hold dumbbells at chest height, elbows on ground.
Press dumbbells up, locking out.
Lower until triceps rest flat on floor before resetting.

name: Overhead Barbell Press
description: Standing barbell press (Military Press) targeting total shoulder size.
instructions: Rack bar at shoulder height. Grip bar overhand, wrists stacked.
Squeeze glutes and core, pull face back.
Press bar straight up overhead, pushing head through at lockout.

name: Seated Dumbbell Press
description: Seated vertical dumbbell press targeting front and lateral deltoids.
instructions: Sit holding dumbbells at shoulder level, elbows flared out.
Press weights straight up overhead, converging slightly.
Lower weights slowly back to shoulder height.

name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: Raising dumbbells outward to build side delt width.
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells at sides, lean slightly forward.
Raise arms out to sides in a wide arc, leading with elbows.
Stop when arms are parallel to the floor, lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Front Raise
description: Raising dumbbells forward to target the anterior (front) deltoids.
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells in front of thighs, palms facing back.
Raise weights forward until arms are parallel to floor.
Lower under control, keeping torso steady.

name: Rear Delt Dumbbell Fly
description: Bent over or chest-supported dumbbell raises targeting rear delts.
instructions: Hinge forward at hips (flat back) or lie chest down on incline bench.
Hold dumbbells, fly arms out to sides, pinching shoulder blades.
Lower weights slowly, keeping tension on rear delts.

name: Rear Delt Machine Fly (Reverse Pec Deck)
description: Using pec deck fly machine in reverse to isolate rear delts.
instructions: Sit facing the pad. Adjust arms so they start in front.
Fly hands out and back in wide arc.
Squeeze rear delts, return slowly.

name: Cable Lateral Raise
description: Constant tension lateral raise using low pulley.
instructions: Stand next to cable, pull single handle across front of body.
Raise handle outwards and up, keeping arm straight.
Lower under control, resisting cable pull.

name: Barbell Upright Row
description: Pulling barbell up to collarbone, leading with elbows.
instructions: Grip bar overhand, slightly narrower than shoulder-width.
Pull bar vertically up body to chest level, elbows pointing high.
Lower bar slowly, keeping shoulders down.

name: Dumbbell Upright Row
description: Vertical upright pull using dumbbells for shoulder width.
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs.
Pull weights up along torso, elbows tracking high.
Lower under control.

name: Arnold Press
description: Overhead dumbbell press incorporating rotation to hit all three delt heads.
instructions: Sit holding dumbbells, palms facing you (like top of bicep curl).
As you press up, rotate wrists outward so palms face forward.
Reverse rotation on descent to return to start.

name: Barbell Push Press
description: Overhead press using leg drive to propel heavy bar.
instructions: Hold barbell at chest height. Dip hips slightly (quarter squat).
Drive legs up explosively, transferring power into overhead press.
Lock bar out overhead, lower under control.

name: Cable Face Pulls
description: Rope face pulls for shoulder health, upper back, and rear delts.
instructions: Set pulley at eye height, grab rope ends thumbs back.
Pull rope to nose, flaring hands out and pinching shoulder blades.
Hold, rotate wrists up slightly, then return.

name: Cable Front Raise
description: Front raise using low pulley between legs.
instructions: Straddle low cable, hold straight bar or rope.
Raise bar straight up in front of you to eye level.
Lower slowly, keeping core tight.

name: Machine Shoulder Press
description: Seated shoulder press machine.
instructions: Adjust seat, sit and hold grips near ears.
Press handles vertically upwards to lockout.
Control weights back to starting.

name: Seated Barbell Press
description: Seated barbell shoulder press.
instructions: Sit on utility bench, unrack bar at shoulder height.
Press bar overhead to full lockout.
Lower slowly to collarbones.

name: Smith Machine Shoulder Press
description: Guarded shoulder press on Smith machine track.
instructions: Align bench under Smith bar. Grip bar wide.
Unlock bar and lower to upper chest.
Press back up to lock out.

name: Reverse Cable Flys
description: Cross cable flys for rear delts.
instructions: Cross arms to grab opposite cables (no handles).
Fly hands out and back, arms parallel to floor.
Return slow, crossing hands.

name: Single-Arm Dumbbell Lateral Raise
description: Unilateral lateral raise leaning away from pole.
instructions: Hold onto pole, lean body away at angle.
Drape weight down, raise dumbbell out to parallel.
Lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Y-Raise
description: Incline bench raise in a 'Y' shape to target lower traps and lateral delts.
instructions: Lie face down on incline bench.
Raise dumbbells forward and out at a 45-degree angle (forming a 'Y').
Squeeze, then return slowly.

name: Landmine Shoulder Press
description: Single arm landmine shoulder press.
instructions: Stand, grip bar at shoulder height.
Press forward and up into lockout.
Lower under control.

name: Barbell Back Squat
description: Classic leg compound loading quads, hamstrings, glutes, and core.
instructions: Rest bar on traps, stand feet shoulder-width.
Send hips back, bend knees, and lower until thighs are parallel to floor.
Keep knees aligned with toes, chest up.
Drive back up through mid-foot to stand.

name: Barbell Front Squat
description: Barbell loaded on front rack shifting load to quads and core.
instructions: Rest bar on front of shoulders, elbows pointing high.
Lower into deep squat, keeping torso vertical.
Drive straight up, keeping elbows high.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
description: Holding dumbbell vertically at chest to practice squat depth.
instructions: Hold dumbbell close to chest, stand feet shoulder-width.
Squat down until elbows brush inner knees.
Stand back up, squeezing glutes.

name: Leg Press Machine
description: Sled leg press to overload quads and glutes safely.
instructions: Sit in machine, place feet shoulder-width on platform.
Release safety, lower platform until knees reach 90 degrees.
Press platform up powerfully without locking out knees.

name: Hack Squat Machine
description: Incline hack squat machine focusing on quad development.
instructions: Lean back against pad, place shoulders under pads, feet on sled.
Release safety, lower sled down as deep as comfortable.
Drive weight up, extending knees and hips.

name: Romanian Deadlift (Barbell)
description: Hip hinge pulling from standing to isolate hamstrings and glutes.
instructions: Stand tall holding barbell, soft bend in knees.
Push hips back, sliding bar down thighs to shins.
Keep back completely flat. Squeeze hamstrings/glutes to return to stand.

name: Romanian Deadlift (Dumbbell)
description: Dumbbell hip hinge to build hamstrings and glutes.
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of thighs.
Hinge hips back, slide dumbbells down close to legs.
Drive hips forward to return to standing upright.

name: Leg Extensions (Machine)
description: Seated machine leg extension to isolate quadriceps.
instructions: Sit in machine, pad aligned on top of ankles.
Extend legs straight out, squeezing quads at peak.
Lower under control back to starting angle.

name: Seated Leg Curls (Machine)
description: Seated machine curl isolating hamstring contraction.
instructions: Sit in machine, leg secured. Pull roller pad down behind ankles.
Squeeze hamstrings, holding brief contraction at bottom.
Slowly extend legs back to straight.

name: Lying Leg Curls (Machine)
description: Lying machine curl isolating hamstrings.
instructions: Lie face down on machine, ankles under roller pad.
Curl heels up to glutes, keeping hips pressed down.
Extend legs back slowly.

name: Walking Lunges
description: Dynamic lunges holding dumbbells to build leg coordination.
instructions: Stand holding dumbbells. Step forward into lunge.
Lower back knee to floor, keeping front knee at 90 degrees.
Push through front foot to step forward into next lunge.

name: Bulgarian Split Squat
description: Single-leg squat bracing rear foot on bench to overload glutes and quads.
instructions: Hold dumbbells, place rear foot flat on bench behind you.
Lower body until front thigh is parallel to floor.
Drive back up through front heel.

name: Calf Raises (Standing Machine)
description: Standing calf machine to load gastrocnemius calf muscle.
instructions: Place shoulders under pads, balls of feet on block.
Lower heels below block to feel deep calf stretch.
Extend ankles high onto toes, squeezing calves.

name: Seated Calf Raises (Machine)
description: Seated machine calf raise targeting soleus muscle.
instructions: Sit in machine, pads on knees. Lower heels down.
Push up through toes, release safety.
Lower heels, press back up, squeeze.

name: Glute Bridges
description: Bodyweight hip lift to activate glutes and hamstrings.
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat on floor close to glutes.
Drive hips up, squeezing glutes at peak.
Lower slow to floor.

name: Barbell Hip Thrusts
description: Bracing shoulders on bench, drive loaded barbell upwards with hips.
instructions: Sit on floor, upper back against bench, load bar over hips (use pad).
Drive feet down, lift hips until torso is parallel to floor.
Squeeze glutes at top, lower under control.

name: Dumbbell Step-ups
description: Stepping onto box with dumbbells to develop unilateral power.
instructions: Hold dumbbells, place one foot on box.
Step up, pushing through box foot to bring other foot up.
Step down slowly, maintaining balance.

name: Leg Press Calf Raises
description: Calf press using leg press machine platform.
instructions: Sit in leg press, place balls of feet on bottom edge of platform.
Push sled, lock safety. Flex ankles to push platform away.
Lower slowly, stretching calves.

name: Bodyweight Squats
description: Unloaded squats to practice mobility and target high-rep burn.
instructions: Stand feet shoulder-width.
Lower down, hips below knees, chest proud.
Drive back up to standing.

name: Abdominal Crunch
description: Standard floor crunch isolating upper abdominals.
instructions: Lie on back, knees bent, hands supporting neck gently.
Lift shoulder blades off floor, contracting abs.
Lower slowly, keeping neck relaxed.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: Hanging from bar, raise legs straight out to parallel.
instructions: Hang from pullup bar, body straight.
Raise legs together, keeping them straight, until parallel to floor.
Lower slowly, avoiding swinging.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
description: Hanging from bar, tuck knees up to chest.
instructions: Hang from bar, pull knees up towards chest.
Squeeze abs at peak, lower legs back to vertical.

name: Decline Bench Crunch
description: Crunches on decline bench to increase load on ab wall.
instructions: Secure feet on decline bench, lie back.
Crunch torso up, keeping abs contracted.
Lower back down under control.

name: Standard Elbow Plank
description: Isometric core hold building absolute abdominal stability.
instructions: Support weight on forearms and toes, body in a straight line.
Squeeze glutes, tuck pelvis, pull belly button in.
Hold position, breathing shallowly (default time in seconds).

name: Side Plank
description: Lateral isometric hold targeting obliques.
instructions: Lie on side, prop torso on elbow.
Lift hips, forming straight line from head to feet.
Hold, then switch sides.

name: Russian Twists
description: Seated twisting motions targeting rotational core and obliques.
instructions: Sit on floor, lean back 45 degrees, hover feet off floor.
Hold hands or a dumbbell together, twist torso side to side.
Tap floor on each side, keeping core locked.

name: Cable Crunch (Kneeling)
description: Kneeling cable pull to crunch abs against stack resistance.
instructions: Kneel facing stack, hold rope ends next to ears/head.
Flex spine, pulling elbows down to thighs using abs.
Return slow, keeping hips locked.

name: Cable Woodchoppers
description: Rotational cable pull across body.
instructions: Stand side to cable, hold handle with both hands.
Pull cable diagonally down and across body, rotating torso.
Return slow. Complete sets on both sides.

name: Ab Wheel Rollouts
description: Rolling ab wheel out to extend torso, challenging core brace.
instructions: Kneel on floor, hold ab wheel handles below shoulders.
Roll wheel forward, extending body in straight line close to floor.
Pull wheel back, engaging abs (do not sag lower back).

name: Flutter Kicks
description: Lying, hover feet and flutter them vertically.
instructions: Lie on back, hands under hips, head slightly up.
Raise feet 6 inches, kick them up and down in alternating flutter.

name: Bicycle Crunches
description: Alternating crunch touching opposite elbow to knee.
instructions: Lie on back, hover legs, hands behind head.
Bring left elbow to right knee, extending left leg straight.
Switch to right elbow to left knee, keeping movement fluid.

name: Toe Touches
description: Lying, raise legs vertically and crunch up to touch toes.
instructions: Lie on back, point legs straight up to ceiling.
Reach hands up to touch toes, lifting shoulder blades.

name: Flat Bench Leg Raises
description: Lying on bench, raise legs from horizontal to vertical.
instructions: Lie flat on bench, hold top of bench behind head.
Raise legs up to vertical, lower them back to bench height under control.

name: Dead Bug
description: Lying core control alternating opposite arm and leg drops.
instructions: Lie on back, arms vertical, knees bent at 90 degrees.
Lower left arm and right leg until hovering above floor.
Return to start, repeat with right arm and left leg.

name: Captain's Chair Knee Raise
description: Supporting body on captain's chair pads, pull knees high.
instructions: Support yourself on arm pads, back against support.
Pull knees up towards chest, lower slowly.

name: V-Ups
description: Fold body into a 'V' shape, raising torso and legs together.
instructions: Lie flat, arms extended behind head.
Lift torso and legs together to touch feet at peak.
Lower under control back to flat.

name: Reverse Crunches
description: Pull hips off floor towards ribs to focus on lower abs.
instructions: Lie on floor, arms flat, knees bent.
Pull knees towards chest, lifting hips off floor.
Lower hips back down slowly.

name: Barbell Wrist Curls
description: Bracing forearms on bench, curl barbell up using wrists.
instructions: Rest forearms on flat bench, hands hanging over edge, palms up.
Hold barbell, let it roll to fingertips, curl wrists up.
Lower bar slowly, repeating motion.

name: Reverse Barbell Wrist Curls
description: Bracing forearms on bench, curl barbell up overhand.
instructions: Rest forearms on bench, hands hanging over edge, palms down.
Curl wrists up to raise the bar.
Lower slowly.

name: Dumbbell Wrist Curls
description: Dumbbell wrist curls to build flexors.
instructions: Rest forearm on thigh or bench, palm up, holding dumbbell.
Curl wrist up, lower under control.

name: Reverse Dumbbell Wrist Curls
description: Dumbbell wrist curls overhand to build extensors.
instructions: Rest forearm on thigh/bench, palm down.
Curl wrist up to lift dumbbell.

name: Wrist Roller
description: Roll weight up and down a dowel to build forearm endurance.
instructions: Hold roller arms straight out, weight hanging.
Rotate wrists to wind cable up, lifting weight.
Slowly reverse rotation to unwind weight (1 up and down = 1 rep).

name: Farmer's Walk
description: Carry heavy dumbbells to build crush grip and traps (default time in seconds).
instructions: Grip heavy dumbbells, stand tall.
Walk in a straight line with short, quick steps.
Keep shoulders packed and grip tight.

name: Plate Pinches
description: Pinch weight plates between thumb and fingers (default time in seconds).
instructions: Pinch two weight plates smooth-sides-out between fingers and thumb.
Hold plates off floor, maintaining pinch pressure.

name: Behind-the-Back Wrist Curls
description: Hold barbell behind thighs, curl wrists up.
instructions: Stand holding barbell behind glutes, palms facing back.
Let bar slide down fingers, curl wrists up to squeeze forearms.
Lower under control.

name: Towel Pullups
description: Pullups gripping a hanging towel to build maximum squeeze grip strength.
instructions: Drape a towel over a pullup bar, grip both hanging sides.
Perform pullups, squeezing the towel hard to stay supported.

name: Dead Hangs
description: Hang from bar to develop endurance grip (default time in seconds).
instructions: Hang from pullup bar with overhand grip.
Keep shoulders active, hold as long as possible.

name: Single-Arm Dead Hangs
description: Hang from bar with a single hand (default time in seconds).
instructions: Hang from bar using one hand, keep core locked.
Hold, switch to other arm.

name: Pinwheel Curls
description: Hammer curl raising dumbbells diagonally across chest.
instructions: Hold dumbbell at side, curl weight diagonally across chest towards opposite shoulder.
Lower under control, alternate arms.

name: Suitcase Carry
description: Unilateral carry walking with single heavy dumbbell (default time in seconds).
instructions: Carry single heavy dumbbell in one hand.
Walk maintaining vertical spine, core resisting tilt.

name: Reverse Cable Curls
description: Overhand curl pulling straight bar from low pulley.
instructions: Grip low pulley straight bar overhand.
Curl bar up, keeping wrists firm and straight.
Extend slowly back down.

name: Dumbbell Wrist Rotations
description: Holding dumbbells, rotate wrists from supination to pronation.
instructions: Hold dumbbell in one hand, forearms rested flat on bench.
Slowly rotate wrists back and forth side to side.

name: Low-Intensity Steady-State (LISS) Run
description: Aerobic base building run at a comfortable, conversational pace.
instructions: Warm up with a 5-minute brisk walk.
Run at an easy pace where you can hold a full conversation.
Maintain a steady, comfortable stride (default target in minutes).

name: Tempo Run
description: Challenging run at 'comfortably hard' threshold pace to build speed endurance.
instructions: Warm up with 10 minutes of easy running.
Accelerate to your threshold pace (about 8/10 effort).
Hold pace for target duration, then cool down.

name: Sprint Intervals (HIIT)
description: High-intensity running intervals to build anaerobic power.
instructions: Warm up with 5 minutes of jogging.
Sprint at 95% effort for target duration (seconds).
Walk/jog slowly for double the duration to recover (repeat sets).

name: Recovery Jog
description: Short, ultra-easy jog to promote blood flow and recovery.
instructions: Run at an extremely relaxed, slow pace.
Focus on light footwork and deep breathing.
Do not push speed; let muscles relax.
